case_title: SKOOP (HENDERSON, JEREMY-OWNER) VS JUST STRATEGY'S (NICHOLS, JASON -OWNER)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUST STRATEGY'S (NICHOLS, JASON -OWNER)
REM: CASE HEARD BY JUDGE CHIANTELLI IN DEPT. 503.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SKOOP (HENDERSON, JEREMY-OWNER) AS TO DEFENDANT JUST STRATEGY'S (NICHOLS, JASON -OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKOOP (HENDERSON, JEREMY-OWNER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JUST STRATEGY'S (NICHOLS, JASON -OWNER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-06-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUL-20-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEATH IN THE FAMILY.
